title: Antirhea aristata
taxonomy: Antirhea aristata is classified in the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family comprises over 13,000 known species and is one of the largest families of flowering plants. The genus Antirhea itself is a member of the tribe Spermaeae within the Rubiaceae family. Antirhea aristata is a species of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Antirhea aristata reflects its evolutionary relationships with other species in the Rubiaceae family.
